lessons.title: Dual Mandate vs. Price Stability First

covered: What a central bank mandate is
The Federal Reserve's dual mandate (employment + price stability)
The ECB's single mandate (price stability first)
Why the disagreement is genuine and persists among Tier 1 institutions

excluded.topic: Optimal target level of inflation (2% debate)
excluded.reason: Requires sourcing a wider set of academic papers; out of scope for this fixture.
